tasks.label: Build and Show Log
tasks.command: & { & "D:\APP\Keil_5\UV4\UV4.exe" -b Project.uvprojx; Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 1000; Get-Content .\Objects\Project.build_log.htm | Select-String -Pattern 'Build target|Error|Warning|Build Time' }

tasks.label: Build with Detailed Output
tasks.command:
& { Write-Host '=== Building Project ==='; & "D:\APP\Keil_5\UV4\UV4.exe" -b Project.uvprojx; Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 1000; Write-Host '
=== Build Summary ==='; Get-Content .\Objects\Project.build_log.htm | Where-Object { $_ -match 'Build target|Error|Warning|Build Time' } }

tasks.label: Clean and Build
tasks.command:
& { Write-Host '=== Cleaning Project ==='; Remove-Item -Path .\Objects\* -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 500; Write-Host '=== Building Project ==='; & "D:\APP\Keil_5\UV4\UV4.exe" -b Project.uvprojx; Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 1000; Write-Host '
=== Build Summary ==='; Get-Content .\Objects\Project.build_log.htm | Where-Object { $_ -match 'Build target|Error|Warning|Build Time' } }
